iframe_containment._answer: SHARED TEMPLATE, not page-local copies. Widget id 14ffcaa8 (the iframe, src=https://estimate.rooval-roofing.com/quote) exists in exactly ONE place: elementor_library post 2229's meta._elementor_data. Pages 1723 (homepage), 40 (about-us), 42 (contact-us), and 51 (our-services) each contain a short Elementor 'template' widget with settings.template_id == '2229' that pulls the template in at render time; none of the 4 pages contain widget 14ffcaa8 in their own _elementor_data. Template 2229's meta._elementor_conditions is an empty array, so it is NOT auto-injected via Elementor Theme Builder display conditions -- it is explicitly placed via the template widget on each of the 4 pages. NOTE: homepage (1723) separately contains its OWN, different, non-iframe 'Get a Free Estimate' link button (href=https://estimate.rooval-roofing.com/quote) in both post_content and its own _elementor_data -- that is a distinct CTA, not the iframe, and must be replaced separately.

cost_page_answer: All 4 'roof-quote' occurrences on the cost page (2950) live INSIDE post_content (the plain page body HTML), including the one embedded inside a <script type=application/ld+json> FAQPage block that is itself written directly into post_content (not a separate schema plugin field). The REST context=edit meta object for page 2950 returned NO rank_math_* keys at all (meta keys present: footnotes, _elementor_edit_mode, _elementor_template_type, _elementor_data, _elementor_page_settings, _elementor_conditions) -- meaning Rank Math's own SEO/schema meta fields are not registered for REST and are invisible/unreachable via this API. Any JSON-LD Rank Math generates separately (if any) cannot be confirmed or edited via REST reads; only the content-embedded JSON-LD copy is visible here.
footer_year_answer:
Stored form confirmed via byte-level inspection: JSON unicode escape sequence \u00a9 (six literal characters: backslash,u,0,0,a,9) -- NOT a decoded UTF-8 copyright glyph and NOT the HTML entity ©. Full stored snippet: '"editor":"

\\u00a9 2025 Rooval Roofing \\u2014 Professional Roof Installation, Repair & Replacement Services.<\\/p>","align":"center","typography_t' A replace key of literal '© 2025 Rooval Roofing' (decoded glyph) or '© 2025 Rooval Roofing' (HTML entity) will SILENTLY NO-OP. The correct stored_old key must contain the literal 6-character escape sequence \u00a9 followed by ' 2025 Rooval Roofing'.
